{{Infobox character
| name = Naian Blackflame
| aliases = Naian
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Path of Black Flame]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Ruler technique]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The Black Dragon Prisoner, last descendant of their original royal family}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Blackflame Empire]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|fighter}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

''See also: [[Naian Blackflame Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Naian [[Blackflame]] is an heir of the [[Blackflame]] lineage who fights on behalf of the black [[dragons]]. A skeletal [[Underlord]], he possesses a tail that he uses for combat and to defend against weapons. During battle, he can manifest a wide, orange [[sacred instrument]] from his [[soulspace]] and utilize the Void Dragon's Dance technique. He also has the ability to grow dark, fiery crystals from his fingers that form claws. Despite his power, he has appeared in a disheveled state with matted hair and grime on his face. In combat, he has faced [[Lindon]], enduring [[dragon]]'s breath but sustaining injuries such as cracked skin and a twisted knee. There are indications that his control over his own body and spirit has been compromised, leading to efforts to restore him from the influence of the gold [[dragons]].}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Known as the [[Black Dragon Prisoner]], Naian [[Blackflame]] is a fighter from the [[Blackflame Empire]] and the final descendant of its original royal lineage. Despite his heritage, he lacks the characteristic [[Blackflame]] eyes and remains restrained by scripted chains and a red scripted collar. Though he had anticipated his current circumstances, Naian still manifests a squat, wide orange blade that glows like a sunset from his [[soulspace]] to fight with razor [[steel]]. During the confrontation, [[Fury]] demands that [[Mercy]] crush him within two seconds, an encounter that ultimately allows [[Lindon]] to absorb the original [[Path of Black Flame]] from him.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Black Dragon Prisoner]]'s real name is [[Naian Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] wants [[Mercy]] to crush Naian in two seconds.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian Blackflame]] is shackled with a red scripted collar and scripted chains.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian Blackflame]] does not have the [[Blackflame]] eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Naian is a fighter from the [[Blackflame Empire]] and the last descendant of their original royal family.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian Blackflame]] manifests a [[sacred instrument]] from his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian Blackflame]]'s [[sacred instrument]] is a squat, wide orange blade that glows like a sunset.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Naian had expected what happened to him.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Naian uses razor [[steel]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian Blackflame]] was in chains.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] absorbed the original [[Path of Black Flame]] from Naian.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] recently struggled against [[Naian Blackflame]] for control of a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naian Blackflame]]'s blood was sprayed across the floor by Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naian Blackflame]] fought [[Lindon]] in battle.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“A fighter from the Blackflame Empire versus the last descendant of their original royal family!”<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
